zh.lifeSummary: Reverend Owen Oglethorpe是Sir Owen John Oglethorpe和Jane Hayward的兒子，出生在英國英格蘭越可爾牛頓 吉。他和Oglethorpe至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1559年12月31日在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 登斯坦 在 馮 韋斯特，埋葬在英國倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Oglethorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Oglethorpe Hall in Bramham (WR Yorks), which is recorded as Ocelestorp in 1086 and Okelesthorp in 1242. The place-name derives from the Old Scandinavian personal name Oddkell + Old Scandinavian or Old English þorp ‘secondary settlement, outlying farmstead’.

nameMeanings.name: Owen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern form of the Welsh name Owain or a transferred use of the surname derived from the personal name. It is also used as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Eóghan (see Scottish and Irish appendices), which is probably ultimately a cognate of the Welsh name. Although retaining its Welsh flavour, this is one of a number of Celtic names which have recently come into general use and have become increasingly popular since the 1990s.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Reverend Owen Oglethorpe was born in Newton Kyme, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Sir Owen John Oglethorpe and Jane Hayward. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Oglethorpe. He died on 31 December 1559, in St Dunstan in the West, London, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Reverend Owen Oglethorpe est né à Newton Kyme, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Sir Owen John Oglethorpe et Jane Hayward. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Oglethorpe. Il est décédé le 31 décembre 1559, à St Dunstan in the West, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Reverend Owen Oglethorpeはイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアニュートン クイメでSir Owen John OglethorpeとJane Haywardの息子として生まれた。彼はOglethorpeとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1559年12月31日にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト ダンスタン イン ス ウエストで死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reverend Owen Oglethorpe(은)는 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 뉴턴 키에서 Sir Owen John Oglethorpe(와)과 Jane Hayward의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Oglethorpe(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1559년 12월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 던스탠 인 테 웨스트에서 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Reverend Owen Oglethorpe nasceu em Newton Kyme, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Sir Owen John Oglethorpe e Jane Hayward. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Oglethorpe. Ele faleceu em 31 de dezembro de 1559, em St Dunstan in the West, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Reverend Owen Oglethorpe родился в местности нютон ким, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Sir Owen John Oglethorpe и Jane Hayward. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Oglethorpe. Он умер 31 декабря 1559 г. в местности ст дунстань ин т вест, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Reverend Owen Oglethorpe nació en Newton Kyme, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Sir Owen John Oglethorpe y Jane Hayward. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Oglethorpe. Murió el 31 de diciembre de 1559, en St Dunstan in the West, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra.
